location: Found on a corpse in the guardhouse of Stormveil Castle's heavily guarded main courtyard — entering from the main gate side, the guardhouse is on the opposite side from the room containing the 'Prophecy' painting. The nearest checkpoint is the Liftside Chamber Site of Grace.
tactics: This is a different pickup from the Manor Towershield, which is found elsewhere inside the same castle — finding one doesn't mean you've already found the other.
The main courtyard is heavily guarded by soldiers and at least one large enemy; picking foes off from range before pushing in makes the grab much safer.
Careful routing from Liftside Chamber grace lets you reach the guardhouse while fighting as few enemies as possible.
lore: A simple wooden greatshield reinforced with metal fittings — humble in construction, but sturdy enough to see a new Tarnished through Stormveil's early gauntlet.

builds.name: Early lightweight turtle
builds.why: Tied for the lightest greatshield in the game (8.0 weight) with only a 14 Strength requirement, giving full physical block almost immediately.

builds.name: Guard-counter starter build
builds.why: Can be infused with an Ash of War (unlike several other greatshields), letting a new character pair it with a guard-counter or buff skill early on.
